description: Choropleth map displaying an example of Natura 2000 (N2K) sites within a larger geographic context, illustrating the concept of "multi-part" polygons as described in Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) documentation. The light blue shaded area represents a larger geographic region, likely a Natura 2000 Area of Interest (N2K AoI). Within this area, six distinct polygons, outlined in turquoise, represent individual Natura 2000 sites or their components. Each polygon is identified by an Italian (IT-prefixed) site code: IT534001
